revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 9 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 9 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月9日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[元禄]]4年（[[1691年]]_月_日） - [[江戸幕府]]が豪商・[[住友家]]に[[別子銅山]]の採掘を許可 * [[文久]]2年（[[1862年]]_月_日） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]]に調印。[[江戸]]・[[大坂]]開市を約定 * [[明治]]4年（[[1871年]]_月_日） - [[東京府]]が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]]区分を布告
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[1017年]]_月_日） - [[三条天皇]]、67代[[天皇]]（* [[976年]]） * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（[[1333年]]_月_日） - [[北条仲時]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]][[六波羅探題]]（* [[1306年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月8日 (旧暦)|5月8日]] 翌日[[5月10日 (旧暦)|5月10日]] - 前月[[4月9日 (旧暦)|4月9日]] 翌月[[6月9日 (旧暦)|6月9日]] *新暦[[5月9日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: =忌日= 三条天皇新暦換算

== できごと == * [[元禄]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1691年]][[6月5日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が豪商・[[住友家]]に[[別子銅山]]の採掘を許可 * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[6月6日]]） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]]に調印。[[江戸]]・[[大坂]]開市を約定 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[6月26日]]） - [[東京府]]が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]]区分を布告
== 誕生日 == * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[6月11日]]） - [[伊能嘉矩]]、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925年]]） * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[6月7日]]） - [[石光真臣]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1937年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[6月5日]]） - [[三条天皇]]、67代[[天皇]]（* [[976年]]） * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月21日]]） - [[北条仲時]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]][[六波羅探題]]（* [[1306年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:May 9 (lunar calendar)]][[Category:qq]]

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 9'''<!--Lunar May9 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[元禄]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1691年]][[6月5日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が豪商・[[住友家]]に[[別子銅山]]の採掘を許可 * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[6月6日]]） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]]に調印。[[江戸]]・[[大坂]]開市を約定 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[6月26日]]） - [[東京府]]が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]]区分を布告
== Births == * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[6月11日]]） - [[伊能嘉矩]]、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925年]]） * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[6月7日]]） - [[石光真臣]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1937年]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[6月5日]]） - [[三条天皇]]、67代[[天皇]]（* [[976年]]） * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月21日]]） - [[北条仲時]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]][[六波羅探題]]（* [[1306年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.

== Deaths == * [[寛仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1017]][[6月5日]]） - [[三条天皇]]、67代[[天皇]]（* [[976]]） * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333]][[6月21日]]） - [[北条仲時]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]][[六波羅探題]]（* [[1306]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:May 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] [[zh:五月初九]] [[en:draft:May 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[June 5]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 6]] ） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[大坂]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[June 26]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[June 11]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 7]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[June 5]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[天皇]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 21]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509}}

[[sn:May 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] [[zh:五月初九]] [[en:draft:May 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[6月6日]] ） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[大坂]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[6月26日]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[6月11日]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[6月7日]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[天皇]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[6月21日]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:May 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] [[zh:五月初九]] [[en:draft:May 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[June 5]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 6]] ） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[大坂]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[June 26]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[June 11]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 7]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[June 5]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[天皇]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 21]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509}}

[[sn:May 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] [[zh:五月初九]] [[en:draft:May 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[June 5]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 6]] ） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[大坂]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[June 26]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[June 11]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 7]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[June 5]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[天皇]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 21]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[June 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 6]] ） - Tokugawa shogunate遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[Osaka]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[June 26]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[June 11]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 7]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[June 5]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 21]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[鎌倉幕府]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ）

[[sn:May 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] [[zh:五月初九]] [[en:draft:May 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[June 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 6]] ） - Tokugawa shogunate遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[Osaka]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[June 26]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[June 11]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 7]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[June 5]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 21]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ）== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] [[zh:五月初九]] [[en:draft:May 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[June 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 6]] ） - Tokugawa shogunate遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[Osaka]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[June 26]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[June 11]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 7]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[June 5]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 21]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Genroku]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1691]] [[June 5]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が豪商・[[住友家]] に[[別子銅山]] の採掘を許可 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 6]] ） - Tokugawa shogunate遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]] に調印。[[江戸]] ・[[Osaka]] 開市を約定 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[June 26]] ） - [[東京府]] が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]] 区分を布告
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[June 11]] ） - [[伊能嘉矩]] 、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 7]] ） - [[石光真臣]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1937]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[June 5]] ） - [[三条天皇]] 、67代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[976]] ） * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 21]] ） - [[北条仲時]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] [[六波羅探題]] （* [[1306]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初九]]

== できごと == * [[元禄]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1691年]][[6月5日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が豪商・[[住友家]]に[[別子銅山]]の採掘を許可 * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[6月6日]]） - 江戸幕府遣欧使節・竹内保徳がラッセル英外相と[[ロンドン覚書]]に調印。[[江戸]]・[[大坂]]開市を約定 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[6月26日]]） - [[東京府]]が中央を馬車道・両端を人道とする[[道路]]区分を布告
== 誕生日 == * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[6月11日]]） - [[伊能嘉矩]]、人類学者、民俗学者（+ [[1925年]]） * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[6月7日]]） - [[石光真臣]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1937年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[6月5日]]） - [[三条天皇]]、67代[[天皇]]（* [[976年]]） * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月21日]]） - [[北条仲時]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]][[六波羅探題]]（* [[1306年]]）

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 9일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初九]][[zh:五月初九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839631]] Wikidata name: 9th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 9|qq=May 9}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1691|1691]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|徳川幕府|zh|德川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} granted permission to the wealthy merchant {{ill|Sumitomo family|de|Sumitomo-Familie|ja|住友家|zh|住友家|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumitomo family|qq=|1=Sumitomo family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381758}} to mine the [[:en:Besshi copper mine|Besshi Copper Mine]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate's envoy to Europe, [[:en:Takenouchi Yasunori|Takeuchi Hoto]], signed the {{ill|London Memorandum|de|London-Memorandum|ja|ロンドン覚書|zh|伦敦备忘录|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/London Memorandum|qq=|1=London Memorandum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11350850}} with British Foreign Secretary Russell, and agreed to open the markets of [[:en:Edo|Edo]] and [[:en:Osaka|Osaka]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture]] announced the establishment of a road classification with a central carriageway and pedestrian sidewalks on both sides.
== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|qq=|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|qq=|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1691|1691]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|徳川幕府|zh|德川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} granted permission to the wealthy merchant {{ill|Sumitomo family|de|Sumitomo-Familie|ja|住友家|zh|住友家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumitomo family|1=Sumitomo family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381758}} to mine the [[:en:Besshi copper mine|Besshi Copper Mine]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate's envoy to Europe, [[:en:Takenouchi Yasunori|Takeuchi Hoto]], signed the {{ill|London Memorandum|de|London-Memorandum|ja|ロンドン覚書|zh|伦敦备忘录|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/London Memorandum|1=London Memorandum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11350850}} with British Foreign Secretary Russell, and agreed to open the markets of [[:en:Edo|Edo]] and [[:en:Osaka|Osaka]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture]] announced the establishment of a road classification with a central carriageway and pedestrian sidewalks on both sides.
== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1691|1691]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|徳川幕府|zh|德川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} granted permission to the wealthy merchant {{ill|Sumitomo family|de|Sumitomo-Familie|ja|住友家|zh|住友家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumitomo family|1=Sumitomo family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381758}} to mine the [[:en:Besshi copper mine|Besshi Copper Mine]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate's envoy to Europe, [[:en:Takenouchi Yasunori|Takeuchi Hoto]], signed the {{ill|London Memorandum|de|London-Memorandum|ja|ロンドン覚書|zh|伦敦备忘录|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/London Memorandum|1=London Memorandum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11350850}} with British Foreign Secretary Russell, and agreed to open the markets of [[:en:Edo|Edo]] and [[:en:Osaka|Osaka]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture]] announced the establishment of a road classification with a central carriageway and pedestrian sidewalks on both sides.
== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1691|1691]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|徳川幕府|zh|德川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} granted permission to the wealthy merchant {{ill|Sumitomo family|de|Sumitomo-Familie|ja|住友家|zh|住友家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumitomo family|1=Sumitomo family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381758}} to mine the [[:en:Besshi copper mine|Besshi Copper Mine]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate's envoy to Europe, [[:en:Takenouchi Yasunori|Takeuchi Hoto]], signed the {{ill|London Memorandum|de|London-Memorandum|ja|ロンドン覚書|zh|伦敦备忘录|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/London Memorandum|1=London Memorandum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11350850}} with British Foreign Secretary Russell, and agreed to open the markets of [[:en:Edo|Edo]] and [[:en:Osaka|Osaka]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture]] announced the establishment of a road classification with a central carriageway and pedestrian sidewalks on both sides.
== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Inō Kanori|Ino Yoshinori]], an anthropologist and folklorist (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, [[:en:Military personnel|Military Personnel]] (died [[:en:1937|1937]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]], the 67th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:976|976]]). * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] (died [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初九]][[zh:五月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初九]][[zh:五月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初九]][[zh:五月初九]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 9|qq=May 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1691|en|1691|WD=Q7682|lt=1691}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|徳川幕府|zh|德川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} granted permission to the wealthy merchant {{ill|Sumitomo family|de|Sumitomo-Familie|ja|住友家|zh|住友家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumitomo family|1=Sumitomo family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11381758}} to mine the {{ill|Besshi copper mine|en|Besshi copper mine|WD=Q994193|lt=Besshi Copper Mine}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|WD=Q7698|lt=1862}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|WD=Q2620|lt=June 6}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate's envoy to Europe, {{ill|Takenouchi Yasunori|en|Takenouchi Yasunori|WD=Q6526546|lt=Takeuchi Hoto}}, signed the {{ill|London Memorandum|de|London-Memorandum|ja|ロンドン覚書|zh|伦敦备忘录|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/London Memorandum|1=London Memorandum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11350850}} with British Foreign Secretary Russell, and agreed to open the markets of {{ill|Edo|en|Edo|WD=Q215646|lt=Edo}} and {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|WD=Q35765|lt=Osaka}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|en|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|WD=Q1189121|lt=Tokyo Prefecture}} announced the establishment of a road classification with a central carriageway and pedestrian sidewalks on both sides.
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Inō Kanori|en|Inō Kanori|WD=Q713093|lt=Ino Yoshinori}}, an anthropologist and folklorist (died {{ill|1925|en|1925|WD=Q18107|lt=1925}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|WD=Q2616|lt=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ishikage Masaomi|de|Ishikage Masaomi|ja|石光真臣|zh|石光真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikage Masaomi|1=Maomi Ishimitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585178}}, {{ill|Military personnel|en|Military personnel|WD=Q47064|lt=Military Personnel}} (died {{ill|1937|en|1937|WD=Q18647|lt=1937}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|WD=Q1193951|lt=Kannin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1017|en|1017|WD=Q19249|lt=1017}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|WD=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō}}, the 67th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|976|en|976|WD=Q23782|lt=976}}). * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Chūji|de|Hōjō Chūji|ja|北条仲時|zh|北条仲時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjō Chūji|1=Hōjō Nakatoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2054736}}, {{ill|Busho (Rank)|de|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|zh|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} ・{{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate}} {{ill|Rokuhara Tandai|en|Rokuhara Tandai|WD=Q938069|lt=Rokuhara Tandai}} (died {{ill|1306|en|1306|WD=Q5716|lt=1306}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|8|5|10|4|9|6|5|0509|qq=}}
